title: Pulse Summary
description: Structured output produced by the csm_pulse_strategist skill. The authoritative governance artifact for a pipeline run — synthesizes all telemetry signals into a final risk posture and recommended actions.

project_key.description: Unique project identifier. Must match the key in state.json.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this pulse summary was generated. Must reflect actual wall-clock time of the run.

risk_posture.description: The synthesized risk posture for this project at the time of the run.

open_flags.description: Number of unresolved risk flags at the time of pulse generation.

summary_narrative.description: Plain English narrative summarizing the project's current risk state. Must be grounded in actual telemetry values — no generic text. Minimum 50 characters.

recommended_actions.description: Ordered list of recommended actions. Must contain at least one item. Even GREEN posture requires a maintenance recommendation.

priority.description: P1 = immediate action required, P2 = action within 5 business days, P3 = monitor.

action.description: Specific, actionable recommendation. Must name the responsible case, account, or team.

owner.description: The team, role, or individual responsible for acting on this recommendation.

examples.summary_narrative: Two P1 cases (CS0012345 for Acme Corp, CS0012346 for Northstar Ltd) are in PENDING state with sla_status BREACHED. Both are resolution breaches with open_duration_hours exceeding 72 hours. Immediate escalation is required before next SLA review window.

recommended_actions.action: Escalate CS0012345 (Acme Corp) to Tier 3 support — resolution SLA breached at 74 hours. Assign a named owner before end of business today.
Escalate CS0012346 (Northstar Ltd) to account manager for executive communication — resolution SLA breached at 81 hours with no update in 24 hours.
